messages.subject: 🚨 LOOP CRITICAL: ict_scanner silent 2h
messages.message: ict_scanner has not run for 2h (expected < 0.5h; >2x threshold = broken, not late). The self-improvement machinery is degraded — a system that doesn't reflect doesn't compound. Check the loop's launchd plist is loaded (`launchctl list | grep alta`) and its logs/.heartbeat_<loop> mtime.
